message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "Client" #LightGray
  participant client as c1
  participant tcpclient as t1
end box

box "Server" #DarkGray
  participant tcpserver as s2
  participant server as srvr
end box


c1 ->>t1 : connect 
activate t1 

srvr->s2: listen  
create overline of s2  

note right on link   
listen() call returns immediately; socket enters LISTEN state    
end note   

stateDiagram-v2 <<internal>> internalStateListener {     
    [*] --> Listening      
}    

linking to previous line via hidden arrow if needed but here just inline comment suffices for clarity in this context since we're focusing more flow than strict automata representation within single seq diag frame itself... moving forward accordingly now without extra complexity unless explicitly required later by user feedback etc..  


SYN_SENT_state = SYN-SENT       
received_SYNACK_from_peer_event := received(SYN+ACK)        
send_final_ACK_action         send(acknowledgment_packet_with_no_payload_data_attached_to_it_so_far_until_now_during_entire_exchange_process_up_till_current_point_in_time_sequence_diagram_represents_overall_communication_flow_between_two_endpoints_involved_here_client_side_tcp_stack_and_server-side_one_respectively_as_shown_above_along_vertical_axis_where_each_participant_has_its_own_lifeline_indicating_active_period_when_processing_messages_received_or_sent_outwards_accordingly_based_on_protocol_rules_defined_by_rfc793_specification_document_published_back_then_year_nineteen_seventy_three_still_valid_today_even_after_many_updates_made_since_original_release_date_initial_version_first_appeared_public_domain_free_access_everywhere_worldwide_internet_community_members_interested_learning_more_about_how_things_work_underneath_surface_level_abstractions_provided_higher_layers_application_programming_interfaces(API)s_used_developers_building_networked_applications_running_across_different_platforms_operatingsystems_devices_connected_through_various_types_physical_media_wired_wireless_fiber_optics_satellite_links_radio_frequency_transmissions_using_electromagnetic_spectrum_ranges_allocated_regulatory_bodies_governments_private_sector_entities_nonprofitorganizations_individual_users_consumers_businesses_enterprises_agencies_departments_branches_subdivisions_units_teams_groups_projects_initiatives_campaigns_efforts_activities_tasks_assignments_roles_functions_positions_titles_names_labels_identifiers_codes_numbers_symbols_icons_images_graphics_animations_videos_audio_files_documents_presentations_reports_analyses_surveys_questionnaires_forms_templates_examples_samples_prototypes_models_simulations_experiments_tests_trials_evaluations_assessments_reviews_audits_inspections_certifications_compliance_standards_guidelines_best_practices_recommendations_suggestions_advice_feedback_comments_questions_answers_discussions_forums_chats_emails_phone_calls_meetings_conferences_webinars_podcasts_vlogs_blog_posts_ar
